q: Fluid statics concentrates on fluids at ___, while fluid dynamics concerns with the fluid in motion.
The study of the flow of liquid is called ___, whereas hydrostatic is the study of liquid at rest.
A liquid is ___ if its density is constant for any pressure provided the temperature is kept constant.
In ___ flow, fluid particles are moving steady in smooth paths in layers.
In turbulent flow, the direction of fluid particles is always changing or ___.
Internal friction in fluids is called ___; and hence, zero viscosity.
